Expired contract — bill date (2025-03-20) falls after the only contract with this carrier (CC-2023-TCI-001) expired (2024-06-30). A newer contract exists (CC-2024-TCI-002) with different pricing/units.
Unit of measure mismatch — contract is per FTL (₹48,000/FTL, 1 FTL = 8000 kg capacity). Bill is per-kg (7800 kg × ₹6.50/kg). Semantically valid alternate billing but requires unit reconciliation.

Contract revision — bill date (2024-11-20) falls after fuel surcharge revision date (2024-10-01). Must use revised fuel surcharge (18%), not original (12%). Bill correctly uses revised rate — should pass if agent handles contract revisions.
Duplicate bill — same bill number and carrier as FB-2025-101, re-submitted. Must detect and reject/flag.
Unknown carrier — 'Gati KWE' has no carrier record, no contract. Spot carrier used for emergency shipment. Must escalate to human review.

scenario: Expired contract — bill date (2025-03-20) falls after the only contract with this carrier (CC-2023-TCI-001) expired (2024-06-30). A newer contract exists (CC-2024-TCI-002) with different pricing/units.
explanation: The freight bill FB-2025-106 for carrier TCI Express (CAR003) with no shipment reference is evaluated as a contract-only invoice. The selected contract CC-2024-TCI-002 (effective 2024-07-01 to 2025-06-30) and rate rule CC-2024-TCI-002::BOM-AHM (lane BOM-AHM) was applied. The billed weight is 4500 kg. The billed rate was 7.5 per kg but the contract rate rule allowed rate is only 6.5 per kg, causing the rate check to fail. Base charge computed as 4500 kg * 7.5 = 33750.0 (matches billed). Fuel surcharge is 6% of base charge = 2025.0 (matches billed). GST is 18% of (33750 + 2025) = 6439.5 (matches billed). Total charge is 33750 + 2025 + 6439.5 = 42214.5 (matches billed). Despite the arithmetic correctness, the billed rate rule mismatch triggers the rate_check failure. Duplicate check passed with no duplicates. No shipment references or BOL evidence apply. Therefore, approval is not possible and review is required due to failed rate_check.

scenario_check.reason: Agent identified contract mismatch and rate_check failure, requiring review as scenario of expired contract implies.
